description_long: This is a vibrant orange athletic running shoe with a streamlined, aerodynamic silhouette and a low profile. The upper is constructed from a synthetic mesh material, featuring subtle ventilation perforations and a prominent black ASICS logo on both lateral and medial sides. The shoe has a standard lace-up closure with flat orange laces and a padded black collar for comfort. The midsole is white and slightly curved, designed for energy return and cushioning, while the outsole is thin and appears optimized for road running. Branding details include 'TOKYO' text on the lateral heel and a logo patch on the tongue. The overall design suggests a lightweight, performance-oriented shoe suitable for urban running environments.
description: A bright orange ASICS running shoe with black accents, mesh upper, and a white cushioned sole, designed for performance and comfort. Features include a lace-up closure, prominent side logo, and 'TOKYO' branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe box, symmetrical lacing, and the ASICS logo on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large black ASICS logo, mesh upper, and the sleek, curved white midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded black collar, heel counter, and subtle black detailing on the heel.
description_view_3: Right side view features the 'TOKYO' branding, black ASICS logo, and the overall aerodynamic profile.
attribute_logo: Black ASICS logo on both sides, red ASICS logo on the tongue label
